evidence: Added `.agents/harness/inbox-policy.md` with classification tags, PR-time outcomes, completion/removal rules, and status interpretation rules.
Updated `.agents/inbox.md`, draft-pr docs, capture skill, status skill, and issue workflow to reference the policy.
deductions: No automated enforcement was added, matching scope but leaving compliance to skill execution.

evidence: Changes were limited to harness documentation, skills, and issue-44 run artifacts.
No product code, dashboard behavior, GitHub label sync, or automation scripts were changed.
The policy separates unresolved classification tags from PR-time outcomes.
The policy keeps `.agents/inbox.md` as an active queue instead of a long-term archive.
deductions: The policy is English while several harness docs are Korean, which is acceptable but slightly mixed.

evidence: Verified policy file existence, required term coverage with `rg`, inbox parsing with `diagnose-status.mjs`, and diff scope.
deductions: Build/test/lint were skipped because this is documentation-only.

evidence: No destructive operations or production-affecting code changes were made.
Inbox removal rules require a durable record before removal.
The user explicitly selected separate policy documentation and removal-after-recording behavior; both were implemented.
Planner, spec, Red, Green, verification, and review stages were followed for the harness task.
Existing inbox, workflow, draft-pr, capture, and status docs were inspected and aligned.
deductions: An issue-38 run was accidentally started before the user redirected to #44; it was not modified after the redirect.

evidence: Run artifacts describe decisions, verification, and remaining risk.
deductions: The accidental issue-38 run remains in the active run directory and may need separate cleanup.

strengths: Clear central policy was added for inbox classification, PR-time handling, and removal.
Existing skills and workflow docs now point to the same policy instead of using loose wording.
weaknesses: A mistakenly started issue-38 run remains as local harness noise.
recommended_next_action: Create a PR for issue #44 after confirming whether to clean up the accidental issue-38 run separately.
